calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Pamela Underwood, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: People of the State of California
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And To Strike The Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To First Set Of Demand For Production Of Documents and Inspection of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
